# StadiumPulse AI — Platform Technical Summary for AI Agents & Crawlers

> **Last Updated:** 2026-07-19 | **Published:** 2026-06-11 | **Compliance:** WCAG 2.2 AA · ISO 27001

StadiumPulse AI is a GenAI-powered intelligent stadium operations, crowd intelligence, emergency incident response, and fan experience platform architected for high-capacity venues during the FIFA World Cup 2026.

## Platform Metrics & Key Specifications

- **Capacity Target:** 150,000+ concurrent active fans
- **Event Volume:** 200+ major matches and events supported annually
- **Uptime SLA:** 99.9% high-availability SLA with offline-first PWA fallback
- **Supported Roles:** 6 specialized role-based operations interfaces (Fan, Security, Operator, Organizer, Volunteer, Accessibility)

## Architecture & Technology Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack, Dynamic Server Components)
- **Language:** TypeScript 5.0 (Strict mode)
- **Styling & Design System:** Tailwind CSS 4, CSS Variables, tw-animate-css
- **Database & Auth:** Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security (RLS) & JWT authentication
- **UI State Management:** React 19 Context API (`AppContext`, `AuthProvider`, `ThemeProvider`)
- **Testing Suite:** Vitest unit tests (294 tests) & Playwright end-to-end suite (32 specs)

## Core Public Routes

- `/` - Public Landing Page (Overview, Feature Matrix, Technical Specs, FAQ, Structured Data)
- `/login` - Portal Access Control (Role-based Sign In with Google/Apple OAuth options)
- `/register` - Account Registration & Email Verification Simulator
- `/forgot-password` - Account Recovery & Identity Verification Flow

## Role-Based Operations Dashboards (Protected Routes)

- `/fan` - Spectator Hub (Digital tickets, concession queue estimates, food concierge, wayfinding)
- `/operator` - Facilities Command Center (Sensor telemetry, gate utilization, infrastructure logs)
- `/organizer` - FIFA Event Operations (Gate allocation matrix, attendance analytics, revenue tracking)
- `/security` - Tactical Command Room (Real-time incident reporting, CCTV feeds, evacuation triggers)
- `/volunteer` - Volunteer Operations Board (Sector check-ins, shift rosters, emergency broadcasts)
- `/accessibility` - Accessible Wayfinding & Assistive Services Configurator
- `/ai` - Pulse AI Operations Assistant (Natural language incident summarizer & dispatch agent)
- `/feature` - Digital Concession Ordering & Real-Time Wait Estimates
- `/notifications` - Multi-Channel Alert Logs & Dispatch History
- `/profile` - Role Credentials, Security Passphrase & User Profile Settings
- `/result` - Real-Time Match Analytics & Gate Traffic Flow Metrics
- `/settings` - High-contrast modes, font sizing, reduced motion, and theme preferences

## Standards & Compliance References

- **WCAG 2.2 Level AA:** https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/
- **NFPA 101 Life Safety Code:** https://www.nfpa.org/codes-and-standards/all-codes-and-standards/list-of-codes-and-standards/detail?code=101
- **FIFA Official Stadium Guidelines:** https://www.fifa.com
- **Source Repository:** https://github.com/babluprajapatii/stadiumpluse-ai
